english: Good morning / How have you slept?

lunyoro: Good morning / How have you slept?

english: My father went to the market.
My grandfather told me a story.
I alone went to the market.
That person over there is a teacher.
The very person I was looking for.
Good morning, how did you sleep?

Two thirds of the people came.
